question: 부장 목록
부서장 목록
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, d.dept_name, p.position_name
   FROM department d
   JOIN employee e ON d.manager_id = e.emp_id
   JOIN job_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id
   WHERE d.is_active = 1;

question: 30세 이상 40세 이하 재직 직원
올해 발령 이력
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, ph.change_type, ph.change_date, ph.reason
   FROM personnel_history ph
   JOIN employee e ON ph.emp_id = e.emp_id
   WHERE YEAR(ph.change_date) = YEAR(CURDATE())
   ORDER BY ph.change_date DESC;

question: 부서별 재직 직원 수
sql:
SELECT dept_name, COUNT(*) AS emp_count
   FROM v_employee_full
   WHERE status = '재직'
   GROUP BY dept_name
   ORDER BY emp_count DESC;

question: 근속 5년 이상 직원
sql:
SELECT emp_name, dept_name, hire_date, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, hire_date, CURDATE()) AS years_worked
   FROM v_employee_full
   WHERE status = '재직' AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, hire_date, CURDATE()) >= 5
   ORDER BY hire_date;

question: 현재 대기 중인 휴직 신청 목록
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, d.dept_name, loa.leave_type, loa.start_date, loa.end_date, loa.reason, loa.status
   FROM leave_of_absence_request loa
   JOIN employee e ON loa.emp_id = e.emp_id
   JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id
   WHERE loa.status NOT IN ('최종승인', '반려')
   ORDER BY loa.created_at;

question: 퇴직 신청 현황 (승인 단계별)
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, d.dept_name, rr.resign_date, rr.reason, rr.status,
          dm.emp_name AS dept_manager, hr.emp_name AS hr_manager, pr.emp_name AS president
   FROM resign_request rr
   JOIN employee e ON rr.emp_id = e.emp_id
   JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id
   LEFT JOIN employee dm ON rr.dept_manager_id = dm.emp_id
   LEFT JOIN employee hr ON rr.hr_manager_id = hr.emp_id
   LEFT JOIN employee pr ON rr.president_id = pr.emp_id
   ORDER BY rr.created_at DESC;

question: 이번달 급여 현황
미지급 급여 목록
이번달 공제 내역
이번달 직원별 수당 상세 내역
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, d.dept_name, s.meal_allowance, s.transport_allowance,
          s.position_allowance, s.overtime_pay, s.other_allowance
   FROM salary s
   JOIN employee e ON s.emp_id = e.emp_id
   JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id
   WHERE s.salary_year = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND s.salary_month = MONTH(CURDATE());

question: 무급 공제가 발생한 직원
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, d.dept_name, s.unpaid_leave_days, s.unpaid_deduction, s.gross_salary, s.net_salary
   FROM salary s
   JOIN employee e ON s.emp_id = e.emp_id
   JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id
   WHERE s.unpaid_leave_days > 0 AND s.salary_year = YEAR(CURDATE());

question: 이번달 지각 직원
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, a.work_date, a.check_in
   FROM attendance a
   JOIN employee e ON a.emp_id = e.emp_id
   WHERE a.status = '지각' AND YEAR(a.work_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(a.work_date) = MONTH(CURDATE());

question: 이번달 승인된 초과근무 건수 및 총 시간
이번달 결근 현황
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, a.work_date
   FROM attendance a
   JOIN employee e ON a.emp_id = e.emp_id
   WHERE a.status = '결근' AND YEAR(a.work_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(a.work_date) = MONTH(CURDATE());

question: 잔여 연차 3일 이하 직원
sql:
SELECT v.emp_name, v.dept_name, al.remain_days
   FROM v_employee_full v
   JOIN annual_leave al ON v.emp_id = al.emp_id
   WHERE al.leave_year = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND v.status = '재직' AND al.remain_days <= 3;

question: 승인 대기 중인 휴가 신청
올해 병가 사용 현황
2024년 하반기 S등급 직원
평가자별 평가 건수
sql:
SELECT evaluator_name, COUNT(*) AS eval_count
   FROM v_evaluation_result
   WHERE eval_status = '최종확정'
   GROUP BY evaluator_name ORDER BY eval_count DESC;

question: 부서별 평균 평가 점수
sql:
SELECT dept_name, ROUND(AVG(total_score), 2) AS avg_score
   FROM v_evaluation_result
   WHERE eval_status = '최종확정'
   GROUP BY dept_name ORDER BY avg_score DESC;

question: 관리자 목록
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, e.email, e.phone, a.username, a.role
   FROM account a
   JOIN employee e ON a.emp_id = e.emp_id
   WHERE a.role = '관리자' AND a.is_active = 1;

question: 잠긴 계정 목록
sql:
SELECT a.account_id, e.emp_name, a.username, a.login_attempts, a.locked_at
   FROM account a
   JOIN employee e ON a.emp_id = e.emp_id
   WHERE a.locked_at IS NOT NULL;

question: 권한별 계정 수
sql: SELECT role, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM account WHERE is_active = 1 GROUP BY role;

question: 올해 공휴일 목록
sql:
SELECT holiday_date, holiday_name FROM public_holiday
   WHERE holiday_year = YEAR(CURDATE()) ORDER BY holiday_date;

question: 최근 감사로그 10건
sql:
SELECT al.created_at, e.emp_name AS actor, al.target_table, al.action, al.column_name, al.old_value, al.new_value
   FROM audit_log al
   LEFT JOIN employee e ON al.actor_id = e.emp_id
   ORDER BY al.created_at DESC LIMIT 10;

question: 안읽은 알림이 많은 직원
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, COUNT(*) AS unread_count
   FROM notification n
   JOIN employee e ON n.emp_id = e.emp_id
   WHERE n.is_read = 0
   GROUP BY n.emp_id, e.emp_name ORDER BY unread_count DESC;

question: 부장들 중 오늘 출근시간이 가장 빠른 사람
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, d.dept_name, p.position_name, a.check_in
   FROM attendance a
   JOIN employee e ON a.emp_id = e.emp_id
   JOIN job_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id
   JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id
   WHERE p.position_name = '부장' AND e.status = '재직'
     AND a.work_date = CURDATE() AND a.check_in IS NOT NULL
   ORDER BY a.check_in ASC LIMIT 1;

question: 부서별 직급별 이번달 지각 횟수
sql:
SELECT d.dept_name, p.position_name, COUNT(*) AS late_count
   FROM attendance a
   JOIN employee e ON a.emp_id = e.emp_id
   JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id
   JOIN job_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id
   WHERE a.status = '지각' AND YEAR(a.work_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(a.work_date) = MONTH(CURDATE())
   GROUP BY d.dept_name, p.position_name ORDER BY late_count DESC;

question: 이번달 과장들 중 가장 늦게 퇴근한 사람 TOP 5
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, d.dept_name, a.work_date, a.check_out
   FROM attendance a
   JOIN employee e ON a.emp_id = e.emp_id
   JOIN job_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id
   JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id
   WHERE p.position_name = '과장' AND e.status = '재직' AND a.check_out IS NOT NULL
     AND YEAR(a.work_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(a.work_date) = MONTH(CURDATE())
   ORDER BY a.check_out DESC LIMIT 5;

question: 부장들 중 이번달 실수령액이 가장 높은 사람
sql:
SELECT v.emp_name, v.dept_name, v.position_name, v.gross_salary, v.total_deduction, v.net_salary
   FROM v_salary_summary v
   WHERE v.position_name = '부장' AND v.salary_year = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND v.salary_month = MONTH(CURDATE())
   ORDER BY v.net_salary DESC LIMIT 1;

question: 부서별 직급별 평균 실수령액
sql:
SELECT v.dept_name, v.position_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(v.net_salary)) AS avg_net
   FROM v_salary_summary v
   WHERE v.salary_year = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND v.salary_month = MONTH(CURDATE())
   GROUP BY v.dept_name, v.position_name ORDER BY v.dept_name, avg_net DESC;

question: 과장들의 잔여 연차 현황
sql:
SELECT v.emp_name, v.dept_name, v.position_name, al.total_days, al.used_days, al.remain_days
   FROM v_employee_full v
   JOIN annual_leave al ON v.emp_id = al.emp_id
   WHERE v.position_name = '과장' AND v.status = '재직' AND al.leave_year = YEAR(CURDATE());

question: 부장들 중 S등급 받은 사람
이번달 초과근무 시간이 가장 많은 직원과 해당 초과근무수당
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, d.dept_name, p.position_name,
          SUM(a.overtime_hours) AS total_ot_hours, s.overtime_pay
   FROM attendance a
   JOIN employee e ON a.emp_id = e.emp_id
   JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id
   JOIN job_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id
   LEFT JOIN salary s ON e.emp_id = s.emp_id
     AND s.salary_year = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND s.salary_month = MONTH(CURDATE())
   WHERE YEAR(a.work_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(a.work_date) = MONTH(CURDATE())
   GROUP BY e.emp_id, e.emp_name, d.dept_name, p.position_name, s.overtime_pay
   ORDER BY total_ot_hours DESC LIMIT 1;

question: 이번달 지각이 3회 이상이면서 잔여 연차가 5일 이하인 직원
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, d.dept_name, late_stats.late_count, al.remain_days
   FROM employee e
   JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id
   JOIN (SELECT emp_id, COUNT(*) AS late_count FROM attendance
         WHERE status = '지각' AND YEAR(work_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(work_date) = MONTH(CURDATE())
         GROUP BY emp_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
   ) late_stats ON e.emp_id = late_stats.emp_id
   JOIN annual_leave al ON e.emp_id = al.emp_id AND al.leave_year = YEAR(CURDATE())
   WHERE al.remain_days <= 5 AND e.status = '재직';

question: S등급 받은 직원들의 평균 급여와 D등급 직원들의 평균 급여 비교
sql:
SELECT ev.grade, COUNT(DISTINCT ev.emp_id) AS emp_count, ROUND(AVG(s.net_salary)) AS avg_net_salary
   FROM evaluation ev
   JOIN salary s ON ev.emp_id = s.emp_id
     AND s.salary_year = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND s.salary_month = MONTH(CURDATE())
   WHERE ev.grade IN ('S', 'D') AND ev.eval_status = '최종확정' AND ev.eval_year = YEAR(CURDATE())
   GROUP BY ev.grade;

question: 관리자 계정의 이번달 출근 현황
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, acc.username, acc.role, a.work_date, a.check_in, a.check_out, a.status
   FROM account acc
   JOIN employee e ON acc.emp_id = e.emp_id
   JOIN attendance a ON e.emp_id = a.emp_id
   WHERE acc.role = '관리자' AND acc.is_active = 1
     AND YEAR(a.work_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(a.work_date) = MONTH(CURDATE())
   ORDER BY a.work_date DESC;

question: 사장의 이번달 급여 명세 상세
sql:
SELECT e.emp_name, p.position_name,
          s.base_salary, s.meal_allowance, s.transport_allowance,
          s.position_allowance, s.overtime_pay, s.gross_salary,
          s.national_pension, s.health_insurance, s.income_tax,
          s.unpaid_leave_days, s.unpaid_deduction,
          s.total_deduction, s.net_salary
   FROM salary s
   JOIN employee e ON s.emp_id = e.emp_id
   JOIN job_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id
   WHERE p.position_name = '사장'
     AND s.salary_year = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND s.salary_month = MONTH(CURDATE());

question: 재직 중인 정규직 직원 목록
